title: Totem of Undying Vegeta
description: This custom Totem of Undying re-skins into Vegeta, designed in detailed pixel-art style
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f1751ee9775b04c8e4e8ddd0abbae104fe3228a.png)

### **Dragon Ball Z Totem – Vegeta (Vanilla Edition)**

Carry the pride of the **Saiyan Prince** with you every time you hold the Totem of Undying. This custom texture pack replaces the default totem with a pixel-art design of **Vegeta**, capturing his determined expression and battle aura in classic Minecraft style.

Whether you’re facing off against mobs, exploring the Nether, or surviving dangerous battles, Vegeta will be at your side—ready to give you that second chance. This is a **vanilla-friendly pack** that requires no mods, no OptiFine, and works seamlessly across **all versions from 1.8+ to 1.21+**.

**OptiFine CIT support Texturepack Available too [Download here](https://modrinth.com/project/kHVXjG3r)**.

## ✨ **Current Characters Available:** 

- **Goku Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-goku)
- **Vegeta Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-vegeta)
- **Gohan Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-gohan)
- **Picolo Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-picolo)
- **Frieza Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-frieza)
- **Roshi Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-roshi)

## 🔥 **Features:**

* Custom Vegeta Totem of Undying
* Fully compatible with **Minecraft 1.16 → 1.21+**

## 📖 **How to use:**

1. Install **OptiFine**.
2. Put the resource pack into your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder.
3. And Enjoy YOur Pvp Battle.

## 👑 **Credits:**

Created by **Totem Factory DBX**.
Dragon Ball Z is property of Toei Animation and Akira Toriyama. This project is **fan-made and free.**
